info.name: ChainBois API - Phase 5: Armory + Points
info.description:
## Getting a Token for Authenticated Endpoints
Use the Phase 1 Simulate Login endpoint: `POST /auth/simulate` with `{"email": "your@email.com"}` (no auth required). See docs/POSTMAN_TESTING_GUIDE.md for full instructions.

request.description: List available weapons grouped by category
List weapons in a specific category
List ChainBoi NFTs available for purchase

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "nfts": [
      {
        "tokenId": 5,
        "level": 0,
        "badge": "private",
        "imageUri": "ipfs://bafybeifd4wjgbvnpf7kmcrkjxp7i4ipz3w2aag3elgfj6v364y2meq6ep4/5.png",
        "contractAddress": "0xB2FDDb56D85073BCBE245D46dbC1BE4D4541305b",
        "metadataUri": "https://test-2.ghettopigeon.com/api/v1/metadata/5.json",
        "traits": [
          {"trait_type": "Background", "value": "Combat Red"},
          {"trait_type": "Skin", "value": "Pale Recruit"},
          {"trait_type": "Weapon", "value": "War Bow"},
          {"trait_type": "Suit", "value": "Covert Ops Carbon Suit"},
          {"trait_type": "Eyes", "value": "Battle Hardened"},
          {"trait_type": "Mouth", "value": "Viking Beard"},
          {"trait_type": "Helmet", "value": "Cryo Enforcer"},
          {"trait_type": "Level", "value": 0},
          {"trait_type": "Rank", "value": "Private"},
          {"trait_type": "Kills", "value": 0},
          {"trait_type": "Score", "value": 0},
          {"trait_type": "Games Played", "value": 0}
        ]
      }
    ],
    "price": 0.001,
    "currency": "AVAX",
    "available": 45,
    "paymentAddress": "0x469622d0FB5ED43B2e7C45E98D355F2cf03816a0"
  }
}

request.description: Submit $BATTLE payment tx to purchase a weapon. Send $BATTLE to the paymentAddress first.
Submit AVAX payment tx to purchase a ChainBoi NFT. Send AVAX to the paymentAddress first. tokenId is optional.
Get points + $BATTLE balance for a wallet
Get points balance and conversion info
Convert points to $BATTLE tokens (dynamic rate based on rewards pool health tier)
View points conversion and purchase history
